productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Printed Grey T-shirt
description: Style NoteLet the apple of your eye enjoy some style in this T-shirt from gini and jony. Stylized with interesting graphic print, team it with shorts or denims and comfy footwear for that super cool look.Product DetailsLight grey round neck T-shirt, has graphic print on the front, branding appliquéd on the left sleeve and brand tag on the hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in cold water using a mild detergent with like coloursDo not tumble dry, bleach or soakWash and dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron on print/embroidery
